extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO Alexey attacked inside 2km on final climb after Astana survived crosswind splits, dropping KRISTOFF who cracked defending red jersey
tactical_patterns: Classics specialists (including Kristoff) drove echelon formation from right-side crosswinds before final climb, foreshadowing split.
Astana's Lutsenko used attack as defense when breakaway threatened, conserving energy while competitors chased down 7-minute gap.
Final climb with 2km remaining proved decisive separation point despite earlier crosswind selections remaining largely intact.

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Back-to-back stage wins show exceptional current form, attacked late on climb after aggressive earlier racing didn't compromise finishing power
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: Cracked with 2km remaining on final climb despite surviving crosswinds in red jersey, suggesting climb length threshold vulnerability
rider_signals.VAN HECKE Preben: neutral: Teammate cooperation in 7-minute breakaway shows UAE willing to commit multiple riders for KOM points strategy
